name: Recap: Head Injuries
subject: Can you remember how to monitor a head injury?
preheader: You should monitor a head injury for 24 hours - can you remember how?

blocks.text: **Can you remember how to monitor a head injury?**
Here is a quick reminder on how to monitor head injuries...
You must monitor the child regularly for 24 hours following a head injury - even if they seem absolutely fine.
**The 3 things you need to check are:**

items: Their skin colour is as you expect to find it - no paleness/blotching
They are responsive - if they are asleep, you don't need to wake them, just check if you can get them to move of their own accord

blocks.text: Remember that all head injuries should be checked with a medical professional and that some serious symptoms can be delayed. If in doubt, get them checked out!

blocks.alt: Paediatric First Aid Made Easy manual

blocks.text: The number 1 cause of head injuries is from a fall.
In the UK around 200,000 people per year are admitted to hospital following a head injury.
